title: Dates for Updates
excerpt: Sometimes it is not always possible to put an update in an item on the day it happens.  It would be good if you could allocate a date for your update.

posts.author: Nat (Nathalie Sarlin)
posts.cookedHtml: Sometimes it is not always possible to put an update in an item on the day it happens. It would be good if you could allocate a date for your update.
